description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:8 Docker image, defines the stages prepare, check, and build, and sets a global cache keyed by ${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG} that stores node_modules and is marked untracked. Add a before_script that runs npm install before every job. In the prepare stage add an install job that also runs npm install and uses the same cache. In the check stage add a lint job that runs npm run lint, a test-ci job that runs npm run load-data then npm run test-ci, and a test-format job that runs npm run test-format, each pulling the cache. In the build stage add a build job that runs npm run load-data then npm run build-dist, and a pages job that runs only on the master branch, runs npm run load-data then npm run build-storybook, pulls the cache, and publishes the public/ directory as an artifact.
